<unk[3:0:263]>There are lots of other caves opened by

<unk[3:0:3]>This one is surely full of...<unk[5:1]><Color=red>creatures
different from anything we know<Color=white>, and I
was already itching to go home.

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>别这么说嘛，

find them only in <Color=red>caves<Color=white>!

<unk[3:0:264]>We made it here safe and sound.<unk[5:1]> I can't
bear to leave until I have <Color=red>10 <Color=white>of them.
Let's go in.<unk[5:1]> Please, we've GOT to!
<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:10 65 110 103 114 121]>Then go by yourself, Nat.

<unk[3:0:4]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>あら…？ この<Ruby={4:10}ほうじゅん>芳醇な<Ruby={2:4}かお>香り…<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>Thank you! I don't expect them for

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:5]><unk[4:0:16 84 105 114 101 100 95 48 49]>太感谢了～
这样我们就不用进入这座洞窟了～

<unk[3:0:5]><unk[4:0:16 84 105 114 101 100 95 48 49]>太感謝了～
這下我們就不必進去這個洞窟了～
話說回來，明明光亮蘑菇只生長在洞窟裡，
你卻擁有這麼多，真厲害呢。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:5]><unk[4:0:16 84 105 114 101 100 95 48 49]><Ruby={2:4}たす>助かった～<unk[5:0]> これでこの<Ruby={4:8}どうくつ>洞窟に

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:5]><unk[4:0:16 84 105 114 101 100 95 48 49]>You're a lifesaver! Now I don't need to
go into that awful cave.

But I have to say, it's amazing that you
collected so many brightcaps. I mean,
they're found only in caves like this.

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>嗯，厉害！<unk[5:0]>
原来你也是个懂得洞窟恩惠的人啊！

有不少宝贝只有洞窟里才能找到！
例如能开采出宝石的<Color=red>矿床<Color=white>，<unk[5:0]>能照亮黑暗的
<Color=red>光亮花的种子<Color=white>……<unk[5:1]>当然还有光亮蘑菇！
<unk[3:0:268]>啊……<unk[5:1]>
有这么多光亮蘑菇，

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>嗯，好厲害！<unk[5:0]>

<Color=red>光亮花的種子<Color=white>……<unk[5:1]>還有光亮蘑菇也是其中之一喔！
<unk[3:0:268]>啊……<unk[5:1]>這麼說來，
你有這麼多光亮蘑菇，該不會是……

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>Yes, it IS amazing.<unk[5:0]> Ooo, you love a good
cave, don't you? And so do I...

They can hold all sorts of wonderful
things.<unk[5:1]> Alluring things. Valuable things!

Like the gems from <Color=red>ore deposits<Color=white>,<unk[5:0]>
<Color=red>brightbloom seeds<Color=white> that illuminate dark
places,<unk[5:0]> and brightcaps, of course!
<unk[3:0:268]>So, you know...<unk[5:1]>if you had enough of these
brightcaps, then maybe YOU could try...<unk[5:1]>
you know...

<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>Er, <unk[5:0]>Nat...<unk[5:1]>you're not thinking about <Color=red>that<Color=white>,
are you? And him?

<unk[3:0:0]>Heh, sorry. Forget you heard anything

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>但是……

<unk[3:0:263]>如果我們有緣再見，那時就是命中註定了，

<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>Whoa, Nat. Has this guy caught your eye

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>其实我们正在这个<Color=red>海布拉地区<Color=white>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>But I will say, we're scouring high and low
for something here in the <Color=red>Hebra region<Color=white>.

We searched most of the south, so now
we intend to go to the <Color=red>north<Color=white>.

<unk[3:0:1]>If we meet again, we'll tell you <Color=red>that<Color=white> <Color=red>secret<Color=white>
of ours.

rows.JPja: あげない

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>…と<Ruby={2:4}おも>思ったら <Ruby={4:6}にもつ>荷物がいっぱいなのね<PageBreak><Ruby={2:6}わたし>私たちの<Ruby={6:10}てりょうり>手料理を <Ruby={2:4}わた>渡そうと<Ruby={2:4}おも>思ったんだけど…<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={2:2}も>持てる<Ruby={4:6}よゆう>余裕ができたら <Ruby={2:4}おし>教えてちょうだい
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>...Or maybe not. Looks like there's too
much in your pouch.

How about you make some room and
come talk to me again? <unk[5:1]>You'll get a fresh
home-cooked meal out of it!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>我们本打算送你亲手制作的料理，
来答谢你的光亮蘑菇……
但你的行李好像还是满的啊。<unk[5:1]>
等你整理好了，再来找我吧？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>為了答謝你把光亮蘑菇讓給我，
我想把我們親手做的料理送給你……
但看來你的行李還是滿的，<unk[5:1]>
等你整理好行李後可以再和我說一聲嗎？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>アカリダケを<Ruby={2:4}もら>貰ったお<Ruby={2:4}れい>礼に
<Ruby={2:6}わたし>私たちの<Ruby={6:10}てりょうり>手料理を <Ruby={2:4}わた>渡したいんだけど…
<Ruby={4:6}にもつ>荷物がまだ いっぱいのようね<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={4:6}せいり>整理できたら <Ruby={2:4}こえ>声をかけてもらえるかしら？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>I wanted to give you a home-cooked meal
as thanks for those brightcaps.

But your pouch is still full!<unk[5:1]> Can we talk
again after you sort your stuff?
